title: PrettyPrinter: init, w/convenience classes.
body:
Introduces PrettyPrinter for use emitting "intelligently" formatted output given a stream of tokens (strings, breaks, begin/end marking groups).

Based on Oppen's algorithm (citation in PrettyPrinter.cpp, as well as some notes/attributions).
See the file headers for more information.

This PR changes no CIRCT behavior.

Also introduces convenience classes previously drafted in #4091 , and replaces #4083.
